name: Planters
description_short: Crescent Garden is a gardening and outdoor living retailer specializing in decorative planters, self-watering containers, and garden accessories—not a financial services provider.
description_long: Crescent Garden is a direct-to-consumer e-commerce retailer focused on container gardening products and outdoor living solutions. The company was founded on the principle that planters should be both functional and aesthetically pleasing, offering innovative designs for indoor and outdoor gardening. Their product catalog includes modular planters, self-watering systems (TruDrop technology), urn planters, raised garden beds, watering cans, sprayers, and garden tools across multiple style collections including Heritage and Modern designs. Products range from small tabletop planters under $100 to large professional-grade containers exceeding $1,000, with materials including plastic, metal, leather, and textiles. The company distinguishes itself through proprietary self-watering technology (TruDrop One, TruDrop Flex, and HF Self-Watering systems) designed to simplify plant care, multi-year product warranties (up to 10 years), free shipping on orders over $99, and curated style collections (Mod, Slat, Delano, Madison-inspired, etc.). Their website includes educational content through Garden Stories, tutorials, and FAQs to support customer gardening success. This is fundamentally a retail e-commerce business with no connection to consumer finance, lending, credit services, or financial products. The "payday-alternatives" categorization is completely incorrect and represents a data error in the CreditDoc system.
services: Modular planter systems with customizable configurations
Self-watering planter technology (TruDrop One, TruDrop Flex, HF Self-Watering)
Raised garden bed sales and installation guidance
Watering cans and accessories (small, large, long-spout varieties)
Sprayer products (360-degree, hand sprayers, pressure sprayers)
Garden tools (long handle and short handle options)
Planter accessories (saucers, surface protectors, casters, plant caddies, hangers, brackets)
Online garden education (Garden Stories, tutorials, FAQ section)
Trade program access for professionals and retailers
Product catalogs and showroom locator tool
Newsletter subscription with first-time buyer discount (10% off)
Seasonal promotional campaigns and bulk order options
pros: Proprietary self-watering technology (TruDrop) reduces daily watering requirements
Extended product warranties up to 10 years on select items
Free shipping on orders over $99 with no minimum purchase requirement
Wide range of price points ($59-$1,280+) serving different budgets
Curated style collections and themed designs (Heritage, Modern, Mid-Century)
Educational resources including tutorials and gardening guides on website
Multiple planter types (modular, hanging, raised beds, tabletop, rail-mounted)
cons: Higher price point than mass-market retailers for comparable planter sizes
Promo codes have restrictions and limited validity periods (LOVE26 expires Feb 17, 2025)
Promotional codes cannot be combined with other discounts or pre-discounted products
Limited information on website regarding shipping times, return policies, or customer service response times
Product availability subject to stock constraints across full catalog
best_for: Home gardeners and plant enthusiasts seeking durable, design-forward containers
Outdoor living designers and landscapers looking for professional-grade planters
Interior decorators requiring statement planter pieces for modern or heritage aesthetics
Busy gardeners interested in self-watering systems to reduce daily maintenance
diagnosis: This is NOT a consumer finance company and is completely miscategorized. Planters/Crescent Garden is a retail e-commerce business selling gardening products with zero connection to payday loans, credit, lending, or financial services. The profile should be removed from CreditDoc immediately or recategorized as a retail company if the platform includes non-finance merchant listings.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
